title: Mothercare India is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Mothercare India is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Mothercare India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated E-commerce Executive to strengthen our Tiruchirappalli-based team.

About Mothercare India:
Mothercare India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mothercare India!
